characters.name: James Avery
characters.description: James AveryBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationchief insurance investigatorPortrayed byDick SargentSeries InformationFirst AppearanceLove Boat AngelsLast AppearanceLove Boat Angels Avery hiredthe Agencyto retrieve items that had gone missing during transport. His job was to make sure that his employer, Eastern International Insurance, didn't have to pay out on expensive claims unnecessarily. WhenTiffanysaidutilitas ante iustitiam(expediency before justice), Avery thought that it was very well put. He didn't care about making sure that criminals got charged; he just wanted to save his company some money.

characters.name: Oliver Barrows
characters.description:
Oliver BarrowsBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationhotel ownerPortrayed byRay MillandRelationshipsRelativesMary Barrows, wife (deceased); Margaret Ellen Barrows, daughter;Glenn Staley, nephewSeries InformationFirst AppearanceOne Love...Two Angels (Part 1)Last AppearanceOne Love...Two Angels (Part 1) Oliver Barrows owned the Barrows Hotel in San Diego. A codicil in his grandmother's will stated that if he had no direct heir then the hotel would go to the city. On December 16, 1956, during a blizzard on a highway between Fort Worth and
Dallas there was a 23-car accident. Mary Barrows and their 17-month-old daughter, Margaret Ellen, were in one of those cars. Mary died, and nobody knew what happened to the daughter.

characters.name: Geoffrey Blackmoor
characters.description: Geoffrey BlackmoorBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationCollege DeanPortrayed byJack FletcherSeries InformationFirst AppearanceTeen AngelsLast AppearanceTeen Angels Blackmoor hired the Angels to investigate the murder of one of his students at Blackmoor Women's College. In recognition of their success, he awardedSabrina,Kelly,Kris, andBosleyhonourary degrees.

characters.name: Bosley 342
characters.description: " Honey, a man can love you and still want you dead." -Rebekah to Elena, Charlie's Angels (2019) Bosley 342Biographical InformationAlias(es)RebekahNickname(s)BosAge40'sGenderFemaleOccupationBosleyAngel (former)StatusAliveAffiliation(s)Charles Townsend Detective AgencyPortrayed byElizabeth BanksPhysical AppearanceHairBlondeEyesBlueRelationshipsMarital StatusSingleFriendsEdgar "Bosley" DessangeSeries InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019)Last AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019) Angel (former) Similar to Sabina, Bosley 342 is a partyer who enjoys her dangerous line of work. However, as a higher official at the agency, she remains cryptic about her past.

characters.name: Jimmy Bosley
characters.description: Jimmy BosleyBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationprivate investigatorPortrayed byBernie MacRelationshipsRelativesMomma Bosley (mother)John Bosley(adoptive brother)Max Bosley(adoptive brother)Series InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels: Full ThrottleLast AppearanceCharlie's Angels: Full ThrottleJimmy takes the place of his brotherJohn Bosleyas the next boy angel in the second movieCharlie's Angels: Full Throttle. TheAngelsandCharlierefer to him as simply Bosley. He first poses as a coroner at the house of the first dead protected witness. He then helps the Angels eliminate suspects at the EBACH by finding out what types of waxes are being used by the suspects.

characters.name: Bosleys
characters.description: In honor ofJohn Bosley, theCharles Townsend Detective Agencycreated a "Bosley" rank that is similar to "lieutenant".[1]Bosleys' recruit, train, and assist the Angels. They are the only ones that get to see Charlie, although it is unknown if they have all seem him. It is also unclear if Bosleys only work with a single team of Angels or multiple ones. Originally there was only one Bosley, John Bosley (code 001), until he left for unknown reasons and was replaced by his adoptive brother,Jimmy Bosley. As the agency grew, more men were externally hired to help the Angels until Rebekah became the first female and Angel to become a Bosley. The original Bosley (code 001) who worked for the Agency since 1976. Through the years he worked with many Angels, and as he said "recruit them":Sabrina Duncan,Jill Munroe,Kelly Garrett,Kris Munroe,Tiffany Welles,Julie Rogers,Natalie Cook,Alex Munday,Dylan Sanders,Rebekah,Sabina WilsonandJane Kanoon a mission. He also metElena Houghlinbut before she became an Angel.

characters.name: Alexander Brok
characters.description: Alexander BrokBiographical InformationGenderMaleOccupationCEO of Brok Industries(former)StatusIn custodyAffiliation(s)Brok IndustriesPortrayed bySam ClaflinPhysical AppearanceHairBrownEyesGreenRelationshipsEnemiesElena HoughlinSabina WilsonJane KanoEmployer(s)John BosleyEmployeesHodak(former)Elena Houghlin(former)Langston(former)Pradeep Prasad(former)Sam Ludwig(former)Susan(former)Peter FlemingSeries InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019)Last AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019) Elena Houghlin(former)Langston(former)Pradeep Prasad(former)Sam Ludwig(former)Susan(former)Peter Fleming Alexander Brokis a major antagonist in the 2019 filmCharlie's Angelswho was the CEO of Brok Industries. He is portrayed bySam Claflin. Brok is a highly strung personality who is often distressed by any setbacks. He is also a callous character who disregards the welfare of others, as when Elena told him that his head of developmentPeter Flemingwas shot, he denigrated Elena for reporting "unnecessary" details to him. He represents corrupt political leaders that are high-ranking officials in the chain of command who choose to refuse acknowledgement of any consequences or condemnable actions committed by their inferiors.

characters.name: Erica Burke
characters.description: EricaBiographical InformationGenderFemaleOccupationHeiressPortrayed byRobin MattsonRelationshipsRelativesClifford Burke (husband)Series InformationFirst AppearanceOf Ghosts and AngelsLast AppearanceOf Ghosts and Angels EricaisTiffany Welles's best friend. Tiffany called Erica "the nicest, most unpretentious person I ever met."[1]She came across as shy around guys, apparently uncertain as to whether they were actually interested in her or just her money. She got over it, only to be fooled.

characters.name: Willamena Campbell
characters.description: Willamena CampbellBiographical InformationGenderfemaleOccupationreference librarian atTiffany's former universityPortrayed byNita TalbotSeries InformationFirst AppearanceAngels on CampusLast AppearanceAngels on Campus Miss Campbell ("Willy" to her friends, thoughBosleywas the first person Tiffany had ever heard use the nickname) was a reference librarian at Tiffany's former university. She was very direct in approaching Bosley, taking an immediate interest in him. When he asked her for a drink she immediately suggested that Carrington's Pub was a "swinging place". Bosley kissed her cheek.

characters.name: Malcolm Case
characters.description: Malcolm CaseBiographical InformationGenderMaleOccupationEx-conPortrayed byLloyd BochnerRelationshipsRelativesSome survived his killing spree and had holdings all over the worldEnemiesCharles TownsendSeries InformationSeason(s)4Ep. Count11First AppearanceAngel HuntLast AppearanceAngel Hunt Malcolm Case killed his father, brother, and a cousin on a safari in Africa in order to get a great fortune by doing that. Case was given a life sentence, and it was his opinion that it wasCharlie's fault, since his was the decisive testimony. He spent eleven years in prison. After escaping, he spent over six months preparing his revenge on Charlie. He took two other life sentence inmates with him when he escaped prison, and in exchange they helped him with his scheme to kidnap the Angels and kill them one at a time until Charlie surrendered himself.

characters.name: Chad
characters.description: ChadBiographical InformationFull NameChadNickname(s)The ChadGenderMaleOccupationSailorStatusAliveAffiliation(s)IndependentPortrayed byTom GreenRelationshipsPartner(s)Dylan Sanders (formerly)Series InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2000) Was it the Chad? Chad (also known as "The Chad")is a minor character inCharlie's Angels (2000). He isDylan Sanders' boyfriend and captain of "The Love Boat". He often calls Dylan "Starfish".

characters.name: Chad
characters.description: ChadBiographical InformationFull NameChadNickname(s)The ChadGenderMaleOccupationSailorStatusAliveAffiliation(s)IndependentPortrayed byTom GreenRelationshipsPartner(s)Dylan Sanders (formerly)Series InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2000) Was it the Chad? characters.name: Phil Chadway
characters.description: Phil ChadwayBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationunspecified government job, possibly with the Secret ServicePortrayed byChristopher GeorgeSeries InformationFirst AppearanceTerror on SkisLast AppearanceTerror on Skis Chadway was assigned to protectCarl Hansworthduring the Vail pro-am skiing competition. He urged Hansworth to drop out of the competition, especially after a fellow agent died protecting him. When Hansworth refused, Chadway was against involving the Angels, feeling that the job should should stay with his agency. Chadway worked closely withKrison this assignment, and the two became rather fond of each other. Chadway admired her bright outlook, and determined to emulate it.

characters.name: Charles Townsend (2011)
characters.description: Charles Townsend, preferably known a s Charlie, is the head of Townsend Agency and the boss ofKate Prince,Eve French,John Bosley, andAbby Sampson.

characters.name: William Cord
characters.description: William CordBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationlawyerPortrayed byPatrick DuffySeries InformationFirst AppearanceOne Love...Two Angels (Part 1)Last AppearanceOne Love...Two Angels (Part 2) Bill Cord was an associate with "Klein-Hoffman and Associates." He was hired byOliver Barrowsto locate Margaret Ellen Barrows who had been missing since she was seventeen months old. Bill producedKelly Garrettas Margaret. Bill fell in love with both Kelly andKris. Without the Angels knowing it, he was spending time being intimate with them both. He said that he sincerely loved them both and could not choose between them.

characters.name: Lydia Danvers
characters.description: Lydia DanversBiographical InformationGenderFemaleOccupationMayor of Paylon, ArizonaPortrayed byJeanette NolanRelationshipsRelativesPaul Danvers(Spouse);Jill Munroe(Niece);Kris Munroe(Niece)Series InformationFirst AppearanceAngels on VacationLast AppearanceAngels on Vacation Jill Munroe(Niece); Kris Munroe(Niece)

characters.description: Paul DanversBiographical InformationGenderMaleOccupationSheriff of Paylon, ArizonaPortrayed byJohn McIntireRelationshipsRelativesLydia Danvers(Spouse);Jill Munroe(Niece);Kris Munroe(Niece)Series InformationFirst AppearanceAngels on VacationLast AppearanceAngels on Vacation Jill Munroe(Niece); Kris Munroe(Niece)

characters.name: Paolo Donettelli
characters.description: Paolo DonettelliBiographical InformationGendermalePortrayed byFrank M. BenardRelationshipsRelativesVincenti Donettelli, fatherSeries InformationFirst AppearanceTerror on SkisLast AppearanceTerror on Skis Paolo Donettelli had been a university student in Rome, and was a member of the Patriots for a Free Society. He was involved in a demonstration alongside his father and their friend, Franco Cirella. Vincenti and Franco were arrested for this and spent two years in prison. It's unclear whether Paolo continued his studies during this time, but by the time they were released he was a sufficiently skilled skier to use this as a cover and enter a pro-am competition. (Vincenti and Franco presumably already had these skills, since they would not have had time to develop them after their release from prison.) Paolo went along with his father's scheme to kidnapCarl Hansworth, who had been a speaker at the event they had protested. Paolo didn't know his father's plans for Hansworth, and lacked the will to stopSabrina(to whom he was attracted) when she escaped his custody. Sabrina stole a snowmobile and used it to run down Vincenti, killing him. Paolo was subsequently arrested, but Sabrina askedPhil Chadwayto see what he could do for him.[1]

characters.name: Bill Duncan
characters.description: Bill DuncanBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationpolice officerPortrayed byMichael BellSeries InformationFirst AppearanceTarget: AngelsLast AppearanceThe Blue Angels Bill DuncanisSabrina's ex-husband. Although the two are divorced by the time of his first appearance, they appear to have remained on very friendly terms, going on outings together, kissing and acting like boyfriend and girlfriend more than exes. Sabrina continued to use his last name after their divorce, too.

We Got Emotionally Involved" -Sabrina to Toby Mann in theLady Killer

characters.name: Elena Houghlin
characters.description: Elena HoughlinBiographical InformationAge25GenderFemaleOccupationPrivate investigatorTech Engineer(formerly)StatusActiveAffiliation(s)Charles Townsend Detective AgencyBrok Industries(formerly)Portrayed byNaomi ScottPhysical AppearanceHairDark brownEyesDark brownRelationshipsRelativesUnknownFriendsSabina WilsonJane KanoLangstonEnemiesAlexander BrockJohn BosleyHodakEmployer(s)Bosley 342Peter Fleming(formerly)Series InformationFirst AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019)Last AppearanceCharlie's Angels (2019)Elena Houghlinis a main character and one of the Angels ofCharles Townsendin the 2019 filmCharlie's Angels. She is portrayed byNaomi Scott. Tech Engineer(formerly) Brok Industries(formerly) Elena is highly intelligent and a skilled hacker who  graduated at the top of her class at MIT. During the earlier missions, Elena was insecure and highly anxious during the early stages of the mission resulting in her panicking. Nonetheless, Elena is shown to be greaty caring and easily befriended Jane and Sabina. After working together, Elena transitions from being the shy scientist to a confident and assertive Angel.[1]

characters.name: Joe Fairgate
characters.description: Joe FairgateBiographical InformationGendermalePortrayed byBrad MauleRelationshipsRelativesSally Fairgate, sister (deceased)Series InformationFirst AppearanceDancin' AngelsLast AppearanceDancin' Angels The Fairgate family owned Fairgate Oil Refineries, Fairgate Meat Packing, and Fairgate Financiers. Joe and Sally entered into a dance contest. Sally was very competitive and enjoyed trying and succeeding at new things. The two were positioned to possibly win the dance competition when Sally was killed.

characters.name: Les Ferrar
characters.description: Les FerrarBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationprofessional gamblerPortrayed bySidney CluteRelationshipsRelativesValerie Ferrar, daughterSeries InformationFirst AppearanceAngels in the StretchLast AppearanceAngels in the Stretch Les made his living by betting on horses. He said that he stole his system from Dr. Dolittle; he spoke with the horses. He kept elaborate notes on every mark and characteristic of every horse on the circuit. Les was murdered, then his body was arranged to make it look like he was killed by a horse.

characters.name: Valerie Ferrar
characters.description: Valerie FerrarBiographical InformationGenderfemaleOccupationstudent (Wellesley College)Portrayed byDeirdre BerthrongRelationshipsRelativesLes Ferrar, fatherSeries InformationFirst AppearanceAngels in the StretchLast AppearanceAngels in the Stretch Valerie was just visiting her father when he died. After he died she hired the Charles Townsend Detective Agency to look into his death, then left to return to school.

characters.name: Filming Locations
characters.description: While most of the interior locations seen throughout the series were sets built on the 20th Century Fox lot in Century City, CA, a few actually brought the stars and production crew to genuine locations in the Los Angeles Season 4 On Location Zuma Beach 1979 area, as well as various other major cities including Las Vegas, NV, Honolulu, HI, and Vail, CO. And, fortunately for Angels fans, many remain relatively unchanged today.

He occasionally datedAlex Mundayand was aware of her working forCharles Townsend. However, when he informedMr. Mundayabout his daughter's real job, he was horrified after Jason explained her duties.

characters.name: Carter Gillis
characters.description: Carter GillisBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationhorse breederPortrayed byDavid HedisonSeries InformationFirst AppearanceAngels in the StretchLast AppearanceAngels in the Stretch Carter squandered all of the money that his father left him. In order to maintain his lavish lifestyle he conspired withKevin Ryanto cheat at horse racing. Carter fell forKelly, who discovered his involvement in the crime and turned him over to police detectives.

characters.name: Carl Hansworth
characters.description: Carl HansworthBiographical InformationGendermaleOccupationenvoy to the United NationsPortrayed byDennis ColeSeries InformationFirst AppearanceTerror on SkisLast AppearanceTerror on Skis Carl was educated at Harvard. He used to play football, but it's not clear if this was at Harvard or elsewhere. According toPhil Chadway, he was one of the youngest up-and-comers in the American political scene. Carl was a friend of President Jimmy Carter, and was his envoy to the United Nations.
